name: Boise (United States)
description: A blue field bearing the white municipal seal of Boise at the centre, with stylised renderings of the Idaho State Capitol and local landmarks.
history: Boise's flag follows the common American municipal pattern of a single-colour field charged with the city seal in white.

features.role: Seal of the City of Boise
features.symbolism: A white emblem depicting the Idaho State Capitol and stylised local landmarks, set within a circular border bearing the city's name; Boise is Idaho's capital and largest city.
